motivo: código extraído mas apenas 5/6 seções presentes
resposta:
solution: 
```class Solution:
    def countLargestGroup(self, n: int) -> int:
        groups = {}
        for i in range(1, n + 1):
            digit_sum = sum(int(digit) for digit in str(i))
            groups[digit_sum] = groups.get(digit_sum, 0) + 1
        max_count = max(groups.values())
        return sum(count == max_count for count in groups.values())
```

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n log n)
space complexity: O(n)
energy implications: LOW
